productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Men Fission Perfume 100 ml
description: The nike fragrances fission natural spray comes in a goblin green flask with top notes of pepper, cardamom, grapefruit and bergamot and heart notes of woody and nutty tones. The fragrance is balanced with its base notes of musk and vetiver.Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
